_comment: Za.allyErrands — Make.com Scenario 2: Payment Confirmed → Dispatch Phalanx
_instructions: Import this into Make.com as a SEPARATE scenario.
This fires when the Flutterwave webhook (Edge Function: flw-webhook)
pings MAKE_PAID_WEBHOOK_URL after a successful payment.
It sends the hard dispatch alert to the Phalanx group.
name: Za.allyErrands — Payment Confirmed Dispatch

flow.label: Client: Runner Being Assigned
flow._note: Optional: send a second WhatsApp to the client. The Edge Function already sent one. Add this only if you want a follow-up after assignment.

parameters.text:
⚡ *Za.allyErrands Update*

Payment received. ₦{{1.amount}} confirmed.

A runner is being assigned to your job right now. You’ll get another update when they’re en route.

Track live: zallyerrands.com/portal
